历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 21549→27954→18480→33079→25129, with significant fluctuations, showing a "sharp drop-rebound" pattern in recent two years; the 2025 baseline is about 25129; the university's science/physics category plans in Shanxi were 116 in 2021, 128 in 2022, 120 in 2023, 134 in 2024, and 114 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 134, an increase of about 17.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus food delivery management disputes, a neutral event; Douyin popularity is "relatively hot" (38th overall), with stable popularity in recent years and no obvious enrollment gaps; Psychology A, Education A, Marxism Theory A-, with distinctive features in teacher training and agriculture, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of related engineering majors is stable; the number of physics category examinees in the province was about 173347 in 2025 and about 167419 in 2026, a decrease of about 3.4%, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 25129, a significant enrollment expansion of about 17.5% in 2026 (intensifying competition), a decrease of about 3.4% in provincial physics category examinees (easing competition), and the university's continuously rising ranking, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27744, with a range of 27244–28244.
